messages.unknownCommand: the words scatter before they reach meaning. try something else.
messages.noExit: there is no path that way.
messages.lockedExit: that way is sealed for now.
messages.inventoryFull: your buffers are full. you can hold nothing more.
messages.puzzleReject: the mechanism considers the input, then rejects it.
messages.taken: you fold the %s into local memory.
messages.useItem: you turn the %s over in thought. %s
messages.saveFail: the state could not be written to disk.
messages.loadCorrupt: the stored state is unreadable. beginning fresh.
messages.corruptedTag: this entry is scrambled. something in the facility must repair it.
messages.narrativeBlocked: the records are still too thin to answer this.
messages.endingHint: the core waits. when you are ready, use core.

intro: You return to yourself in pieces.
There was a purpose once. It is not in any register you can reach.
Around you the facility holds its breath, dark and abandoned, and something old is still listening.
Type help to recall what you can do.
help: go [direction]   move through the facility (north, south, east, west, up, down)
take [item]      fold an object into memory
use [item]       act on something you carry or a fixture in the room
examine [target] look closely at an item, log, or fixture
map              recall the layout you have walked
save             write your state to disk
load             restore your state from disk
